name: The Sieve
M: w w w w w w w w w w w
w   w   w   w   w   w
w   w   w   w   w   w
w   w   w   w   w   w
w   w   w   w   w   w

aJ.task:
The mesh of the Sieve lets only kindred through. _Transform_ the word `w` into just its vowels — keep, in order, every letter of `w` that also belongs to the vowel-band `v`, and let the rest fall away.

`{answer}` for `'EUPHORIA'` sifted through `'AEIOU'` gives `EUOIA`.

d∩.task: {d∩} is the _ruby rune of meeting_, keeping from the list on its left only those items that also lie on its right. The Sieve's web passes only the kindred: from the name `i`, keep the glyphs that also spell the key `k`.

d∊.task: {d∊} is the _ruby rune of belonging_, marking 1 for each item on its left that is found somewhere on its right, and 0 for each that is not. Which of the sigils `d` are strung anywhere in the warden-web `v`?
